instruction:
We now define an algorithm: The definition of a(n) is k appears 2k-1 times in the sequence and each number is the square root of its position in the sequence, rounded up. Given the input x_list (a series of values): [87, 88, 89, 90, 91, 92, 93, 94, 95, 96], determine the corresponding output sequence y_list.

Options:
A. [15, 15, 15, 15, 15, 15, 15, 15, 15, 15]
B. [8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 8]
C. [13, 13, 13, 13, 13, 13, 13, 13, 13, 13]
D. [7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7]
E. [14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14, 14]
F. [10, 10, 10, 10, 10, 10, 10, 10, 10, 10]
G. [11, 11, 11, 11, 11, 11, 11, 11, 11, 11]
H. [9, 9, 9, 9, 9, 9, 9, 9, 9, 9]
I. [16, 16, 16, 16, 16, 16, 16, 16, 16, 16]
J. [12, 12, 12, 12, 12, 12, 12, 12, 12, 12]
